name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Pronto
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a raw code to a remote transmitter specified in Pronto format.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The raw code to send specified as a string. Many remote control Pronto codes can be found on [http://remotecentral.com](http://remotecentral.com)
